shared_context.purpose: Visual system and Figma-based design workflow

agents.name: Orchestrator Agent
agents.role: Plans the workflow and assigns work

agents.name: PM Agent
agents.role: Generates PRD, feature list, and low-tap user flow

agents.name: System Designer Agent
agents.role: Designs local SQL schema, upgrade path, and data model

agents.name: Flutter Agent
agents.role: Generates web-first Flutter UI structure and code

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.role: Validates outputs, flow friction, and missing cases
